questions.q: Who scored the go-ahead goal in the third period for the Carolina Hurricanes to complete a 4-game sweep of the Ottawa Senators in the first round of the 2026 NHL playoffs?
Which player scored a dramatic equalizer 13 minutes into injury time to clinch York City's return to the English Football League in a 1-1 draw against Rochdale?
Which Los Angeles Lakers player scored 29 points, including a tying 3-pointer with 13 seconds left in regulation, to help secure a 112-108 overtime win and a 3-0 series lead over the Houston Rockets?
Who took a 5-shot lead into the final round of the 2026 Chevron Championship after shooting a third-round 70?
Which top tennis player withdrew from the 2026 Madrid Open after falling ill during a match?
